skew.error: The checkpoint you are trying to load has model type `gemma4` but Transformers does not recognize this architecture. This could be because of an issue with the checkpoint, or because your version of Transformers is out of date.

deterministic_mode.finding: TRT-LLM deterministic mode = run-to-run reproducibility, NOT batch-size invariance (M=1 vs M=8). Byte identity across batch size is a strictly different, more expensive contract (per-token isolated accumulation).
deterministic_mode.citation: arXiv:2601.17768 'Enabling Determinism in LLM Inference'; TRT-LLM deterministic-reductions docs (run-to-run only).

speculative_decoding.finding: EAGLE/Medusa/ReDrafter/MTP-draft require a working TRT-LLM model definition for the base model (blocked by B1/B3). Only Lookahead/NGram are model-def-agnostic, and neither matches the deployed MTP K=7 lane.

failures.B: ValueError: model type `gemma4` but Transformers does not recognize this architecture (builtin runtime transformers 4.57.3)
failures.C: ImportError: cannot import name AutoModelForVision2Seq (after upgrading bundled transformers to 5.5.0) -> catch-22

multimodal.finding: Serving contract forbids dropping modalities; TRT-LLM has no gemma4_audio (conformer/USM) encoder path, so a text-only TRT-LLM engine is non-compliant.
multimodal.citation: TRT-LLM supported-models multimodal matrix (audio 'Untested' for E4B).

B1_transformers_version_skew.evidence: TRT-LLM 1.2.1 pins transformers==4.57.3 < gemma4-min 5.5.0; load under pinned -> ValueError (model type gemma4 unrecognized).

B2_head_dim_512_on_ampere.evidence: full-attention global_head_dim=512 > Ampere FMHA cap 256; sliding head_dim=256 (mixed per-layer head_dim, no TRT-LLM path).

B3_ple_kvshare_perlayer_rope.evidence: PLE vocab_per_layer=262144, num_kv_shared_layers=18, mixed_head_dim=True; not expressible in TRT-LLM decoder def.

B4_multimodal_contract.evidence: serving contract forbids dropping modalities; TRT-LLM has no gemma4_audio (conformer/USM) path -> text-only engine non-compliant.
